methods.name: HeartPrint mmWave Radar Authentication
methods.description: Non-contact, passive, and continuous authentication method that uses mmWave radar to detect skin surface vibrations caused by heartbeat patterns. Specifically designed to work in multi-user environments.
sources: @article{wangHeartPrintExploringHeartbeatBased2022,  title = {{{HeartPrint}}: {{Exploring}} a {{Heartbeat-Based Multiuser Authentication With Single mmWave Radar}}},  author = {Wang, Yao and Gu, Tao and Luan, Tom H. and Lyu, Minjie and Li, Yue},  year = {2022},  month = dec,  journal = {IEEE Internet of Things Journal},  volume = {9},  number = {24},  pages = {25324--25336},  issn = {2327-4662},  doi = {10.1109/JIOT.2022.3196143}}
